titleStmt.title: SII 41.118: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 118. (A.R. No. 117 of 1905.) Tiruvālīśvaram, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Vālīśvara temple at Tiruvālīśvaram.

summary.p: Vatteluttu. Records a decision of the sabhā of Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam not to collect the taxes maṉṟuvari and taṇḍukuṟṟam on the cultivators of the dēvadāna land of the Tiruvālīśvaram temple who live in the new settlement called Niṟāḍinallūr. They have to pay some dues after the fourth year of their living in the new settlement.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . yāṇṭu patiṉeṭṭu nāḷ munnūṟṟu nāṟpattaiñcu śrīrā[ja]rāja catutarvveti maṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom peraṅki ttu brahmasdhāṉattu maṇṭapan tuṭṭakkiyil kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi Iruntu Aṟañceyta paricāvatu Ivvūrkkaṭiñaikkarai tiruvālīśvarattut tevar tevatāṉattuk
kuṭi Ēṟukiṉṟa Iṭam niṟāṭinallūreṉṟu periṭṭuk kuṭi Ēṟuvatākavum Itiṟkuṭi Ēṟi Irunta kuṭikaḷai maṉṟuvari taṇṭukuṟṟa muṭpaṭa maṟṟum nāṅkoḷḷap peṟuva Epperppaṭṭatum nāṅ koḷḷātoḻivatākavum Ittevatāṉattuḻavu kuṭikaḷai ce veṭṭiyallatu nam paṭākai Uḻavu kuṭikaḷiṟukku niṟai Ep
perpaṭṭatum variñcu koḷḷappevarākavum Ivvūrēṟiṉa kuṭikaḷukku mittēvatāṉattuḻavu kuṭikaḷukku mituvē sarvvaparihāramāvatākavum taptamāṣamum maḻuvum samvatsaravāriyar Ittiruvālīśvaratte Iṭuvippārākavum Uḻavar patimarkku Aṭiyuṟai Oru kāciṭṭu maḻu
veṟpatākavum taptamāṣattuk kaiyyiṭuvār Ittevar Aṭiyuṟai Iraṇṭukku miṭuvatākavum Ivayiṟṟukkuk kaṇkāṇi samvatsaravāriyañceyvār vara kaṇkāṇiyāvatākavu mivayiṟṟāl peṟṟa mutalittevaṟku viṣuayaṉaṅkaḷukku vicamuṭpaṭamaṟṟumittēvarku veṇṭuvaṉavukku vicamāvatākavum I
nniṟāṭinallūrk kuṭiyeṟiṉa kuṭikaḷil nivantakkāṟaruṅ kārāṇmaik kuṭiyumallātārivvāṇṭu mutal nālāṇṭu kuṭiyiruntu maṉṟuvari yuṭpaṭa Epperppaṭṭatu miṭātē kuṭi Iruntu Innālāṇṭuṭaik kaḻiccāl A raivakka mittevarkku viṣu Ayaṉaṅkaḷukku vicamuṭpaṭa maṟ
ṟum veṇṭuvaṉattukku vicamāka Iṭuvarākavum Āka Ipparicu kaccañ ceyta Ivvicattil yāteṉu moṉṟu Aḻiya paṇittāraippeṟ perāṉ patiṉ kaḻañcu poṉ taṇṭamiṭap peṟuvatākavum A[ḻikkaccammati Aḻiyātitākavum kkaccappaṭi nam samvatsaravāriyar tiruvāliśvarattut tevar śrīkoyiliṟ
kaṉmel veṭṭuvippārākavum Ipparicup paṇiccukkaraiyiṭṭukkaraiponta ce nittam riv veḻai kuṭittevan tattaṉār paṇikka śrīrājarājacceri kkuṭi nilakaṇṭanār paṇikka śrī Uttamacoḻacceri cakki kkiramavittar paṇikka śrī pāṇṭiyaṉmahādevicceri pākaḷūr kumāraṟa
ṭṭac comāciyār paṇippaṇiyiṉāṟ paṇiccukkaccañceyto
m mahāsabhaiyom mahāsabhaiyār paṇikka Eḻutiṉāṉivvūrc cavai
kkaṇakkaṉ kecavaṅ karumāṇikkattiṉeḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 41.118 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
